blocks.text: You can reach the Larkspur Family Foundation by email at hello@larkspur.example.org or by calling the volunteer helpline at 555-0100 during weekday afternoons. This contact information is invented for the fixture. A real person, usually a parent volunteer, answers the helpline and can help you find pages on this site or connect you with a clinic in the care network.

The foundation is a distributed group of volunteers rather than a single office. The best way to reach a human is the helpline or the email address above. We aim to reply within a few business days, and we never ask for medical records or personal health details over email.
